mapper.insert: INSERT INTO campus_auth_history ( user_id, auth_id, college_id, real_name, student_no, class_name, cert_image, status, reject_reason, review_time, reviewer_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{authId}, #{collegeId}, #{realName}, #{studentNo}, #{className}, #{certImage}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{reviewTime}, #{reviewerId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE campus_auth_history SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = ( SELECT id FROM ( SELECT id FROM campus_auth_history WHERE auth_id = #{authId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest )
mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.auth_id AS authId, h.college_id AS collegeId, c.name AS collegeName, h.real_name AS realName, h.student_no AS studentNo, h.class_name AS className, h.cert_image AS certImage, h.status, h.reject_reason AS rejectReason, h.review_time AS reviewTime, h.create_time AS createTime FROM campus_auth_history h LEFT JOIN college c ON h.college_id = c.id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY h.id DESC

SELECT h.id, h.auth_id AS authId, h.college_id AS collegeId, c.name AS collegeName, h.real_name AS realName, h.student_no AS studentNo, h.class_name AS className, h.cert_image AS certImage, h.status, h.reject_reason AS rejectReason, h.review_time AS reviewTime, h.create_time AS createTime FROM campus_auth_history h LEFT JOIN college c ON h.college_id = c.id WHERE h.auth_id = #{authId} ORDER BY h.id DESC

SELECT h.id, h.auth_id AS authId, h.college_id AS collegeId, c.name AS collegeName, h.real_name AS realName, h.student_no AS studentNo, h.class_name AS className, h.cert_image AS certImage, h.status, h.reject_reason AS rejectReason, h.review_time AS reviewTime, h.create_time AS createTime FROM campus_auth_history h LEFT JOIN college c ON h.college_id = c.id WHERE h.id = #{id} AND h.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
